vars._comment: Optional. Reusable prefixes; ${name} in any config value or a projects/*.md 'path:' expands to these, so a repo-root move is a one-line change.

frameworkRoot: (optional) ${code}/meta-os — defaults to resolving the instance's systems/ symlink
claudeHome: (optional) /Users/you/.claude — engine home whose session logs feed the usage widget; defaults to ~/.claude

auth._comment: Optional. Omit or set enabled:false for single-user (open) mode. When enabled, the client runs OIDC Authorization Code + PKCE against your Tessera IAM issuer. `enforce` gates the API server-side and currently fails closed (501) until JWKS token verification is implemented — leave it false until then.
